classification.category_basis:
用于识别动力连接器或电源接口的针脚/接线定义，包括动力接口 pinout、引脚编号与针脚功能对应关系、针脚名称、U/V/W/PE、L/N/PE、DC+/DC-、P+/P-、Brake+/Brake-、制动器、电源正负极、保护地、相线、线色、线径、端子号、接线说明、连接器针位图、针脚分配表。

必须同时满足：
1. 出现连接器针脚、端子或接口信息；
2. 至少有一个针脚编号与功能、信号名、线色、线序、电源极性、相线、保护地或接线关系对应。

仅有引脚编号，但没有功能定义，不应归入本类。
仅出现 Power Wire、Housing、Terminal、连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、连接器安装位置、接插件外形图、插头/插座物料信息时，不应归入本类。
仅显示 1/2/3/4 等孔位编号和 Housing/Terminal 型号，应归入 connector_housing_terminal 或 connector_structure，不应归入 power_connector_pinout。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪和全图标注区域显示'Connector Detail (Power Wire)'中的针脚表，包含'PIN'与'FUNCTION'列，1至4号针脚分别对应'MOTOR U'、'MOTOR V'、'MOTOR W'、'MOTOR PE'及线色'YELLOW'、'RED'、'BLACK'、'YELLOW/GREEN'，属于电机动力相线和保护地的接线定义。

title.title_zh: 动力线连接器针脚定义

classification.category_basis: 用于识别编码器、反馈器、传感器或信号连接器的针脚/信号定义，包括反馈接口 pinout、17-pin/15-pin/9-pin/多芯信号接口、引脚编号、VCC、+5V、+12V、GND、0V、A+/A-/B+/B-/Z+/Z-、U/V/W Hall、Hall A/B/C、SIN/COS、S+/S-、CLK/DATA、SD+/SD-、FG、Shield、NC、信号脚、屏蔽线、线色、接线说明、针脚分配表。必须体现信号功能、针脚编号、线序、线色或反馈接口定义；仅出现连接器外形、Housing、Terminal、线束走向或安装位置时，不应归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域是全图中标注为反馈线连接器详情的一部分，表格列出'PIN'、'FUNCTION'、'COLOR'，并给出1至6号针脚对应VDD、GND、MA_P+、MA_N-、SLO_P+、SLO_N-及线色，属于反馈/信号连接器针脚与线序定义。

title.title_zh: 反馈线连接器针脚定义表
title.title_en: Feedback Wire Connector Pin Definition Table

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪框显示4孔连接器正面结构、孔位编号'1'至'4'以及物料文字'Housing:H66L6-04P'、'Terminal:T66L6-A'；未在目标框内给出针脚功能、线色或接线对应关系，因此按连接器外形与物料信息归入机械尺寸类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机的技术参数表，包含极数、直流母线电压、额定功率、额定转矩、额定转速、电流、惯量、绝缘等级、冷却方式和防护等级等机械/电机规格信息；未出现扭矩-转速坐标曲线或针脚接线定义，因此最接近'机械尺寸'类。

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域为电机前端法兰和线缆/插头外形安装示意，包含'L≥300'、'2-φ3.5'、'φ45±0.2'、'45°'、'15Max'、'40'等尺寸、公差和角度标注，以及连接器型号'SC-06'但没有针脚功能或接线定义，属于机械结构尺寸图。

title.title_zh: 电机端面与线缆安装尺寸图
title.title_en: Motor Front Face and Cable Installation Dimension Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: Connector-side marking retained as visible label; engineering meaning is not fully determined.
Corrected OCR text from 2-3.5 to 2-φ3.5 based on visible diameter symbol and hole callout syntax.
Corrected OCR leading ? to φ based on visible diameter callout.
Vertical overall dimension retained; OCR confidence lower but visually consistent.

terminology_notes: φ is normalized as diameter symbol Ø in English engineering specifications.
Max is interpreted as maximum limit for the associated dimension.

dimension_records.reason: Callout is attached to the cable/lead path and specifies minimum length.
Text appears on the connector body as a label, not as a dimensional value.
Leader line points to the connector and the text is a connector identifier.
Circular label is a visible drawing or design version marker rather than a part dimension.
Vertical dimension line indicates a maximum height/clearance above the reference level.
Leader points to mounting holes; callout uses standard quantity-diameter notation.
Angular dimension is shown with an arc and leader around the mounting pattern.
Leader points to the circular mounting/bolt pattern and the callout is a diameter with bilateral tolerance.
Vertical outside dimension defines the square mounting face height.
Horizontal outside dimension defines the square mounting face width.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Square mounting face is 40 mm by 40 mm, with 2 × φ3.5 mm mounting holes and a φ45±0.2 mounting circle callout; angular relation shown as 45°.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible envelope-related callouts include 40 mm width, 40 mm height, and 15 mm maximum protrusion/clearance.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Cable length is L≥300 mm. Connector callouts include SC-06 and a visible connector body marking SM-6P.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: Shaft diameter, keyway, detailed tolerances beyond φ45±0.2, material, and datum references are not specified in this crop.

unresolved_items.reason: Low-confidence slanted OCR near connector/linework; not reliably readable as an engineering label.
Overlapping fragments within the L≥300 callout area; superseded by complete OCR source ocr_003.
Overlapping partial/incorrect readings within the SC-06 callout area; superseded by complete OCR source ocr_007.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域和完整标注源图中对应橙色框均显示电机外形轮廓、轴端结构、线缆出口以及多处尺寸和公差标注，如 '12-0.43'、'M3螺纹深8'、'孔深10'、'φ30-0.021'、'20.5±0.2'、'74.6±1'，属于机械外形和安装尺寸信息。

title.title_zh: 电机外形及轴端尺寸图
title.title_en: Motor Outline and Shaft End Dimension Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read as 12-0.43; visible callout is nominal 12 with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.43.
Selected highest-confidence overlapping read for the top small feature; normalized stacked tolerance.
Normalized vertical stacked tolerance for the same 3 mm feature dimension.
OCR omitted diameter symbol and read underscore; corrected to diameter with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.013.
OCR omitted diameter symbol and read underscore; corrected to diameter with upper deviation 0 and lower deviation -0.021.

terminology_notes: Stacked tolerance values were normalized as upper/lower deviations.
translation_notes: THREAD DEPTH translated as 螺纹深度.
HOLE DEPTH translated as 孔深.

dimension_records.reason: Small upper-left detail shows a 12 mm dimension with stacked unilateral tolerance.
Top small feature detail shows a 3 mm dimension with unilateral tolerance.
Vertical callout near the small feature indicates another 3 mm controlled dimension with the same unilateral tolerance.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径8 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.013
dimension_records.reason: Diameter symbol is visible before 8 on the shaft diameter callout; tolerance is stacked as 0 and -0.013.

dimension_records.parameter_en: Threaded hole size and thread depth
dimension_records.reason: Leader note points to the shaft-end feature and explicitly states M3 thread depth 8.
Second line of leader note gives the hole depth as 10.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 直径30 mm，上偏差0，下偏差-0.021
dimension_records.reason: Left vertical diameter callout controls the cylindrical interface diameter.
Dimension line under the shaft-end slot marks a 12 mm length.
Bottom-left horizontal dimension spans the shaft extension to the shoulder.
Short bottom dimension near the shoulder indicates a 2.8 mm local length.
Short horizontal dimension between the shoulder and main body indicates 5 mm.
Long bottom dimension spans the main body length.
Lowest left horizontal dimension spans the front extension region.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Visible mounting-related dimensions in this crop include main body length 74.6±1 and local step dimensions 5 and 2.8.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Shaft/interface callouts include Φ30 0/-0.021, Φ8 0/-0.013, shaft extension 20.5±0.2, slot length 12, and small feature tolerances 12 0/-0.43 and 3 0/-0.014.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Overall envelope information visible in this crop includes 23.8±0.8 front extension and 74.6±1 main body length.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Connector or cable geometry is visible, but no connector dimensional text in this crop has OCR source evidence.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No reliable additional visible text may be added without OCR source_ids.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别电机性能曲线类图纸或图表，包括扭矩-转速曲线、转速-扭矩关系、连续扭矩、峰值扭矩、间歇扭矩、额定扭矩、最大扭矩、转速范围、额定转速、最高转速、工作区间、S1/S2/S3 工作制、短时运行区、连续运行区、功率曲线、效率曲线等。典型特征是坐标轴、曲线、工作区域、转速单位 rpm/r/min、扭矩单位 Nm/N·m。
classification.reason: 目标区域是电机扭矩-转速特性图，包含纵轴 T(N.m)、横轴 n(rpm)、转速刻度 0 到 5000，以及 'Intermittent'、'Continous' 等工作区标注和两条性能曲线，明显属于性能曲线图。

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR captured only N.m; visible vertical axis title includes T(N.m).
Corrected OCR spelling from Continous to Continuous.

terminology_notes: This crop is a torque-speed performance chart within a mechanical drawing, not a dimensional view.
translation_notes: Intermittent translated as 间歇工作; Continuous translated as 连续工作.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 转矩刻度值：0 至 0.56 N.m
dimension_records.reason: These labels are the y-axis torque scale values on the performance curve, not individual mechanical dimensions.
Vertical axis label identifies the plotted quantity and unit; OCR source captured only part of the visible label.

dimension_records.normalized_specification_zh: 转速刻度值：1000 至 5000 rpm
dimension_records.reason: These labels are the x-axis speed scale values on the performance curve.
Axis title identifies the plotted speed quantity and unit.
The label describes the upper performance curve operating mode.
The label describes the lower performance curve operating mode; spelling was corrected from OCR.

dimension_records.parameter_zh: 连续曲线起始转矩标注
dimension_records.reason: The value is placed at the left start of the continuous torque-speed curve and indicates a curve value rather than a mechanical dimension.
The value is placed at the common endpoint of the plotted curves on the speed axis.

audit_table_records.normalized_specification: 转矩刻度值：0 至 0.56 N.m
转速刻度值：1000 至 5000 rpm

audit_table_records.parameter_zh: 连续曲线起始转矩标注

engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No unresolved OCR items; chart units are shown as N.m and rpm, while mechanical dimensional units are not present in this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标区域是整张机械外形图技术数据表中的环境条件分栏，包含'Temperature'、'Humidity'、'Environment'、'Installation altitude'等使用条件参数；不含扭矩转速曲线，也不含动力或反馈连接器针脚功能定义。在给定类别中最接近机械图纸技术规格信息，归入机械尺寸类。
